name: Raisin Breakfast Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, wheat germ, sugar, baking powder, and cinnamon.
2. Stir in margarine, honey, egg, and vanilla; mix well.
3. Stir in raisins and walnuts.
4. Press mixture firmly into a greased 8-inch square pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Makes 10 bars.
